name: Measured Pacing
description: Balanced rhythm with natural variation between fast and slow passages. The default pacing for most stories.
prompt_fragments: Vary paragraph length naturally — mix short punchy paragraphs with longer descriptive ones.
Match pacing to emotional content: faster in conflict, slower in reflection.
Allow breathing room between major events. Not every scene needs a cliffhanger.
Transitions between scenes should feel organic, not jarring.

lexicon_preferences.notes: Natural prose rhythm. No artificial constraints on sentence length.

validation_heuristics: Flag three or more consecutive short paragraphs (under 20 words each) outside of dialogue.
Flag three or more consecutive long paragraphs (over 150 words each).
